description: State document in Arabic script. Genre and content are unclear. There are multiple text blocks, at one point written in two parallel columns. There are two different registration marks at the top: The one in bold reads "al-ḥamdu li-llāh ḥamdan yurḍīhi", and the other is a ḥasbala followed by other formula.. The end of the first line may read وكشفنا صح, indicating that the information contained here has been checked. About halfway down, on the right, there is a testimony of a Qāḍī attesting to the case named Thiqat al-Mulk. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בכתב ערבי. הסוג והתוכן לא ברורים. יש גושי טקסט מרובים. יש שני רישומי הרשמה בחלק העליון. יש עדות של קאדי בשם ת'יקת אל-מולכ. דורש בדיקה.
